html:
Petals are a Vegetable Food Item obtained by picking Flowers, which are commonly found in Grassland Biomes. They restore 5 Sanity when picked and 1 Health point when eaten. Like other vegetables, they can be fed to Pigs to produce Manure. No variant of petals may be used in a Crock Pot.

Petals can be used to craft the Garland, a Headwear item which restores Sanity over time, the whirly fan which slows overheating when walking and the Pretty Parasol which offers a little bit of rain protection. Petals are also used to decorate Wendy's Sisturn to activate its +25 Sanity / min aura, and increase the regeneration rate of Abigail's health pool.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Tumbleweeds may drop Petals, Dark Petals, or Foliage when harvested.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Petals are used to craft Tropical Parasols and Floral Shirts. There also is a small chance to obtain them while spending Dubloons at the Slot Machine.

In the Hamlet DLC, Petals can be bought for 1 Oinc at the Curly Tails Mud Spa in the Pig City. Foliage can be used as a crock pot ingredient, and counts as a Vegetable.

Trivia

  • Petals used to be required to craft a Floral Shirt in the Reign of Giants DLC. It was later changed to require Cactus Flowers instead.
    • However, in Shipwrecked worlds, Petals are used once again to replace Cactus Flowers, as they cannot be easily obtained.

Gallery

  • Original HD petals icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

"petals"
“I showed those flowers who's boss!”
–Wilson
“Stupid flowers. They're almost useless.”
–Willow
“These smell nice.”
–Wolfgang
“Its joy and happiness was so disparaging...”
–Wendy
“I HAVE DESTROYED SOMETHING BEAUTIFUL. HA.”
–WX-78
“I've made some delightful potpourri.”
–Wickerbottom
“I wonder if Lucy would like these.”
–Woodie
“I've a habit of destroying beautiful things, don't I?”
–Maxwell
“Smells faintly of chamomile.”
–Wagstaff
“Thank yöu Fröh för this gift!”
–Wigfrid
“How colorful.”
–Webber
“Flowers totally get me.”
–Walani
“Great in salads.”
–Warly
“Them flowers ain't comin' back ta life.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA CAN'ST EATS FOR PRETTY FOODS”
–Wilba
“Smells good”
–Wormwood
“Perfectly good ammo, just laying around.”
–Wheeler
“Don't see a whole lotta use for these.”
–Winona
“Evidence of flower violence.”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee, take that flowers!”
–Wurt
“Hope the bees aren't too mad at me.”
–Walter
“They wither away so quickly.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cánh hoa là một Vật phẩm Thực phẩm Thực vật thu được bằng cách hái Hoa, thường được tìm thấy trong Quần xã Đồng cỏ. Chúng phục hồi 5 Tinh Thần khi được chọn và 1 điểm Máu khi ăn. Giống như các loại rau khác, chúng có thể được cho Lợn ăn để tạo ra Phân. Không có biến thể cánh hoa nào có thể được sử dụng trong Nồi Hầm.
